articles.title: Iran 'getting a lot closer' to agreement with US, Trump says
articles.summary: Tehran also signals progress on talks but says the key issue of nuclear weapons is not part of an initial framework it is working on.

articles.title: At least 82 killed in Chinese coal mine explosion
articles.summary: The blast in Shanxi province constitutes the country's worst mining disaster in 16 years.

articles.title: Red Cross volunteers die from suspected Ebola in DR Congo
articles.summary: They are thought to have caught the virus before the outbreak was identified, the Red Cross says.

articles.title: French mum and partner held until trial after sons abandoned by road in Portugal
articles.summary: The couple, who allegedly left the woman's sons on a roadside in southern Portugal, will remain in custody.

articles.title: Putin vows retaliation after accusing Ukraine of hitting student dormitory
articles.summary: Ukraine says it struck Russia's elite Rubicon drone military unit in a Moscow-occupied region.

articles.title: F1 great Prost 'injured as masked gang raid home'
articles.summary: Four-time Formula 1 world champion Alain Prost was injured when a masked gang raided his home near Geneva, Swiss media reports.

articles.title: Nascar champion Kyle Busch died of pneumonia and sepsis, family says
articles.summary: The driver died aged 41 on Thursday after "overwhelming complications" from the illnesses.

articles.title: Rubio meets Modi during India visit with energy high on agenda
articles.summary: The secretary of state wants to sell US energy to Delhi to make up for shortfalls caused by the Iran war.

articles.title: California declares state of emergency as fire crews race to contain toxic chemical leak
articles.summary: Thousands have been evacuated as officials warn a tank containing about 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate could explode.

articles.title: Senegal's president sacks PM and former ally after months-long feud
articles.summary: Bassirou Diomaye Faye also dissolved the government, creating uncertainty amid a debt crisis in the country.
